text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto asks me to review her diet results
after dealing with a slow metabolism.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Have a... look at this... My weight is nearly what it
was before.
choice_data_list: Why do you look so exhausted?!
Why do you look so exhausted?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm just... a little hungry... but my body feels
so empty and light.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I guess this is the result of diligent fasting...
choice_data_list: You're depriving yourself of essential nutrients!
You're depriving yourself of essential nutrients!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You might be onto something... Instead of feeling
light, I... think I'm feeling weak.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh no, did I make another mistake?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, is there any hope for me?!

Meisho Doto rebalances her diet with proper
nutrition and a fitness regime to get back in good
shape.
